_meta.comment: 履歷唯一真實來源 (single source of truth)。改這裡 → 跑 node resume/generate.mjs 重生所有產物。內容依 2026-07 使用者提供的 PM 一頁式履歷 (PM_陳羿瑄.pdf) 重建。

headline.zh: 產品經理 · 0→1 產品建構 × AI 應用落地
headline.en: Product Manager · 0→1 Product Building × Applied AI

summary.zh: 專注於 0→1 產品建構與 AI 應用落地的產品經理，針對問題整合 AI 解決、不侷限單一職能。擅長定義核心問題、設計可規模化架構，並以數據與效率為導向推動落地；關注 AI 自動化、決策優化與使用者行為設計。
summary.en: A product manager focused on 0→1 product building and applied AI—solving problems by integrating AI rather than staying in one function. I define core problems, design scalable architectures, and drive delivery with a data- and efficiency-first mindset, focused on AI automation, decision optimization, and user-behavior design.

subtitle.zh: AI 產品策略｜自動化建構｜金融科技產品優化

name.zh: 以 Vibe Coding 獨立交付財經 KOL 品牌入口 LP
name.en: Delivered finance-KOL brand-entry LPs solo (Vibe Coding)

bullets.zh: 不佔工程資源，雙作者驗證累計買單 3,100+、開發 940 位全新客、報名轉換 14–18%、合計約 1.8 億元營收；並將流程 SOP 化，助 4+ 位行銷／PM 於 1 天～1 週自主上線。
bullets.en: No engineering resources needed—validated across two flagship authors: 3,100+ purchases, 940 net-new customers, 14–18% conversion, ~NT$186M combined revenue; codified into an SOP so 4+ marketers/PMs ship independently in 1 day–1 week.

bullets.zh: 將老舊桌面端選股產品改造為網頁版（期貨 3 週、長線 5 週落地），故障率降低 50%、DAU 成長至 2 倍；並將流程 Skill 化，協助 4 個 PC→Web 專案上線。
bullets.en: Rebuilt legacy desktop stock-picking products as web apps (futures in 3 weeks, long-term in 5); 50% fewer failures, 2× DAU; skill-ified the process to help 4 more PC→Web launches.

name.zh: 投資理財 App 0→1 規劃與交付

bullets.zh: 主導股票 App 0→1 核心功能設計，撰寫完整 Spec 並以 Figma 產出高保真原型，AI prototype 結合雙 RD 快速交付。H1 營收 1,811 萬、月留存 96%（作者 App 前 3）、75% 活躍付費、週活兩月成長約 3 倍（644→近 2,000）。
bullets.en: Led 0→1 core feature design—full specs, Figma high-fidelity prototypes, AI prototyping with two RDs. H1 revenue NT$18.1M, 96% monthly retention (top-3 author apps), 75% active-paying, WAU ~3× in two months (644→~2,000).

name.zh: 以 AI SaaS 與自動化加速公司工作流程
name.en: Accelerated company workflows with AI SaaS & automation

bullets.zh: 兩個月內為行銷、工程、產品部門自動化 40% 重複性工作、效率 +85%，並打造社群大師等 Agent，單月為團隊省下 20–50 小時。
bullets.en: Automated 40% of repetitive work across marketing, engineering, and product in two months (efficiency +85%); built agents (e.g., a community-manager Agent) saving teams 20–50 hours/month.

name.zh: 引領公司 AI 轉型與知識傳播

bullets.zh: 配合公司 Agent 開發政策建構 10+ 公司服務 Skills 並提供 AI 諮詢，助 10+ 位無工程背景 PM／行銷落地服務；並將部署、資料庫等基礎知識做成 Skill＋文件傳播。
bullets.en: Built 10+ company-service skills and provided AI consulting under the firm's Agent initiative, enabling 10+ non-engineer PMs/marketers; packaged deployment/database fundamentals into skills and docs.

name.zh: GenInk — Human-AI 協作創作工具

zh: 不是讓 AI 取代創意，而是輔助創作。以曾獲全台編劇首獎的經驗，解決長篇創作中角色設定變動導致全文重寫、成本過高的問題。
en: Not AI replacing creativity but augmenting it—drawing on a national top-screenplay-award background to solve the high cost of rewriting long-form work whenever character settings change.

zh: 為解決減重過程枯燥、用戶難以堅持的痛點，運用八角框架驅動核心內在動機，設計遊戲化關卡系統；帶領四人團隊於兩個月內完成 0→1 產品開發，獲內測用戶高度評價。
en: Tackled the boredom that makes weight-loss hard to sustain by using the Octalysis framework to drive intrinsic motivation and designing a gamified level system; led a 4-person team to ship 0→1 in two months with strong beta-user praise.

degree.zh: 擔任 PM 統籌 0→1 開發並親自實作 UI 與前端工程，於分享會傳承知識；具跨領域協作能力，獲導師高度評價與推薦。
degree.en: PM coordinating 0→1 development while personally building UI and front-end; shared knowledge at meetups. A cross-disciplinary collaborator, highly recommended by mentors.

degree.zh: 影視學系 學士｜全系排名第 1
degree.en: B.A. in Film & Television｜Ranked #1 in department
